checks.name: windows-home-resolution
checks.detail: Shared helpers now resolve Windows-sensitive env keys case-insensitively and regression tests cover HOME, USERPROFILE, HOMEDRIVE/HOMEPATH, and mixed env-key casing.

checks.name: windows-codex-shim-detection
checks.detail: Runtime and bootstrap tests pass for Windows-like codex.cmd resolution through mixed Path/PATH and PATHEXT casing.

checks.name: bootstrap-guidance-accuracy
checks.detail: Bootstrap now distinguishes true CODEX_MISSING from CODEX_UNAVAILABLE when the binary is present but unusable.

checks.name: github-facing-onboarding-docs
checks.detail: README and bootstrap/quickstart docs now use document-title links, a first-start flow diagram, and compact state/port tables.
